title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IRCTC Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IRCTC Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the IRCTC Logistics family as a Distribution Manager in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IRCTC Logistics:
IRCTC Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
